info.name: DynDisc2-MultiContract-AR-AP-CashReserve
info.description:
DYNDISC-2: Multi-Contract AR/AP Dynamic Discounting with Dynamic Cash Reserve
================================================================================

TODAY: 2026-03-05

OVERVIEW:
  10 ACTUS PAM contracts (5 AR + 5 AP) with LINEAR EarlySettlementModel.
  1 ACTUS CSH contract models the $1,000 opening cash reserve.
  Shared state space tracks the cash reserve dynamically via Postman COLLECTION VARIABLES
  (no external environment needed - works with Environment=none in Runner).
  IEDs are +/-30 days from today. Due dates = IED + 30 days. One settlement date
  per contract (randomly chosen within the window). Discount rates 2-5% LINEAR.

SHARED STATE SPACE (Postman collectionVariables - no environment required):
  dd2_cashReserve     -- Running cash balance (seeded at $1,000.00)
  dd2_totalARInflow   -- Cumulative early-settlement receipts
  dd2_totalAPOutflow  -- Cumulative early-payment disbursements
  dd2_arSettledCount  -- Count of AR contracts settled early
  dd2_apSettledCount  -- Count of AP contracts settled early
  dd2_insufficientCash-- Flag: true if any AP hit a cash shortfall
  dd2_ledger          -- JSON array of per-contract settlement records

  CASH_RESERVE_01 reference index is dynamically refreshed before each AP
  simulation via pm.sendRequest in the pre-request script, so the ACTUS
  EarlySettlementModel checks the CURRENT running balance.

FIX (2026-03-05): All pm.environment.set/get replaced with
  pm.collectionVariables.set/get so the collection runs correctly with
  Environment=none selected in Postman Runner.

FIX (2026-03-05 v2): TWO BUGS FIXED:
  BUG 1 - INIT state wipe: INIT pre-request now guarded with
    if(pm.info.iteration === 0) so re-runs don't reset live accumulators.
  BUG 2 - AP PP payoff=0: ACTUS RPL (debtor) contracts return PP events
    with payoff=0 because the EarlySettlementModel sets discounted payoff
    only for RPA (creditor) role. AP test scripts now detect PP event
    presence (= ESM triggered) and compute the discounted amount directly
    using the LINEAR formula: payoff = notional*(1 - maxRate*remainDays/30).

CONTRACT PORTFOLIO:
  AR-INV-001 [AR] IED=2026-02-12 settle=2026-02-28 3% disc  payoff=$493.0
  AR-INV-002 [AR] IED=2026-02-24 settle=2026-03-09 5% disc  payoff=$583.0
  AR-INV-003 [AR] IED=2026-03-18 settle=2026-03-30 2% disc  payoff=$444.6
  AR-INV-004 [AR] IED=2026-02-06 settle=2026-02-22 4% disc  payoff=$539.73
  AR-INV-005 [AR] IED=2026-03-27 settle=2026-04-08 5% disc  payoff=$465.6
  AP-INV-001 [AP] IED=2026-02-16 settle=2026-03-03 3% disc  payoff=$394.0
  AP-INV-002 [AP] IED=2026-03-12 settle=2026-03-25 4% disc  payoff=$488.67
  AP-INV-003 [AP] IED=2026-02-22 settle=2026-03-07 5% disc  payoff=$340.08
  AP-INV-004 [AP] IED=2026-03-22 settle=2026-04-06 2% disc  payoff=$594.0
  AP-INV-005 [AP] IED=2026-04-04 settle=2026-04-17 3% disc  payoff=$412.86

CASH FLOW SUMMARY (expected):
  Opening balance  : $1,000.00
  AR inflows       : +$2525.93
  AP outflows      : -$2229.61
  Net              :  $296.32
  Closing balance  : $1296.32

DISCOUNT FORMULA (ACTUS LINEAR EarlySettlementModel):
  discount(elapsed) = maxRate x (remainingDays / 30)
  payoff            = notional x (1 - discount)

PHASES:
  INIT  : Seed collection variable shared state (cashReserve=$1,000)
  Ph 1  : Register reference indexes (BUYER_CASH, CASH_RESERVE, HURDLE_RATE)
  Ph 2  : Register 10 EarlySettlementModels (one per contract, single settle date)
  Ph 3  : Register 10 ACTUS scenarios
  Ph 4  : Simulate CSH opening balance (baseline IED only)
  Ph 5  : Simulate 5 AR contracts -- cash inflows, update cashReserve
  Ph 6  : Simulate 5 AP contracts -- refresh CASH_RESERVE, draw down cashReserve
  Ph 7  : Dashboard -- full ledger, savings analysis, final balance assertion

ACTUS CONTRACT TYPES:
  PAM (Principal at Maturity) -- AR and AP invoices
    contractRole RPA = supplier/creditor (AR: receives payment)
    contractRole RPL = buyer/debtor      (AP: makes payment)
  CSH (Cash)                  -- Cash reserve account (constant notional)

BEHAVIORAL MODEL:
  EarlySettlementModel (LINEAR):
    Registered via /addEarlySettlementModel endpoint (risksrv3 port 8082)
    Evaluated at the single monitoringEventTime (= settlement date)
    POF call: returns discountedFraction -> payoff = fraction x notional
    STF call: returns 1.0 -> notional set to 0 (contract closed)
    Decision: settle if discount APR > hurdleRate AND buyer has sufficient cash
    NOTE: For RPL (debtor) role, ACTUS sets PP.payoff=0; ESM still fires
          and the PP event IS present -- detection uses PP presence, not payoff.

PREREQUISITES:
  - actus-server on localhost:8083
  - risksrv3    on localhost:8082
  - Open Postman Console (Ctrl+Alt+C) before running
  - Run as Collection (Runner) with Environment=none

SCHOLARLY BASIS:
  Song Hua et al. (2023): FIMP-based dynamic discounting framework
  GSCFF (2024): ADR formula, buyer-specified discount models
  Gelsomino et al. (2016): Four-phase DD process model
  ACTUS FRF: PAM+CSH taxonomy, EarlySettlement callout type

Based on ACTUS official documentation:
  https://www.actusfrf.org/taxonomy   https://www.actusfrf.org/dictionary

exec: // FIX fix2: sentinel-based guard - INIT only seeds state if sentinel is not 'seeded'.
// To force a fresh run: clear dd2_sentinel in Collection Variables tab.
console.log('DYNDISC-2  |  AR/AP Multi-Contract + Dynamic Cash Reserve');
console.log('  Discount: LINEAR 2%/3%/4%/5%  |  IEDs within +/-30d of today');
console.log('  State stored in: pm.collectionVariables (no env needed)');
console.log('INIT skipped - state already seeded (sentinel=seeded). Clear dd2_sentinel to force re-seed.');
pm.test('BUYER_CASH added',function(){pm.response.to.have.status(200);console.log('BUYER_CASH_01: $500K constant - AR buyer always has funds');});
pm.test('CASH_RESERVE added',function(){pm.response.to.have.status(200);console.log('CASH_RESERVE_01: $1,000 initial - refreshed before each AP sim');});

console.log('Phase 4: CSH - Opening Cash Reserve $' + cr.toFixed(2));
if(ied) console.log('  CSH IED: notional=$' + ied.nominalValue.toFixed(2));
var pp = events.filter(function(e){ return e.type==='PP' && Math.abs(e.payoff)>0; });
var payoff = Math.abs(pp[0].payoff); var saving = 500.0 - payoff;
console.log('SETTLED AR-INV-001: payoff=$' + payoff.toFixed(2) + ' saving=$' + saving.toFixed(2));
} else { console.log('No PP event - runs to maturity'); }

pm.test('AR-INV-001 IED before PP', function(){ var evts=pm.response.json()[0].events; var ied=evts.find(function(e){return e.type==='IED';}); var pp=evts.find(function(e){return e.type==='PP';}); if(ied&&pp) pm.expect(ied.time<=pp.time).to.be.true; else pm.expect(true).to.be.true; });
var payoff = Math.abs(pp[0].payoff); var saving = 600.0 - payoff;
console.log('SETTLED AR-INV-002: payoff=$' + payoff.toFixed(2) + ' -> cashReserve=$' + newCR.toFixed(2));

var payoff = Math.abs(pp[0].payoff); var saving = 450.0 - payoff;

item.name: Phase 6: AP Simulations - Cash Outflows (CASH_RESERVE refreshed pre-sim)

exec: console.log('  cashReserve before: $' + cr.toFixed(2) + '  sufficient for $394? ' + (cr>=394?'YES':'NO'));

for(var i=0;i<120;i++){ var d=new Date(baseDate.getTime()+i*86400000); var ds=d.getFullYear()+'-'+(d.getMonth()<9?'0':'')+(d.getMonth()+1)+'-'+(d.getDate()<10?'0':'')+d.getDate()+'T00:00:00'; rfDates.push({time:ds,value:cr}); }

pm.sendRequest({url:'http://'+(pm.collectionVariables.get('actus_risk_host')||'localhost:8082')+'/addReferenceIndex',method:'POST',header:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:{mode:'raw',raw:JSON.stringify({riskFactorID:'CASH_RESERVE_01',marketObjectCode:'CASH_RESERVE',base:1.0,data:rfDates})}},function(err,res){ if(err) console.log('WARN refresh failed:'+err); else console.log('  CASH_RESERVE_01 refreshed to $'+cr.toFixed(2)+' HTTP '+res.code); });
// FIX: ACTUS RPL contracts return PP.payoff=0 -- detect PP presence,
//      then compute discounted amount via the LINEAR formula.
if(cr < payoff){ pm.collectionVariables.set('dd2_insufficientCash','true'); console.log('WARN INSUFFICIENT CASH for AP-INV-001: need=$'+payoff.toFixed(2)+' have=$'+cr.toFixed(2)); }
console.log('PAID AP-INV-001: remainDays='+remainDays+' disc='+(discount*100).toFixed(4)+'%  payoff=-$'+payoff.toFixed(2)+'  saving=+$'+saving.toFixed(2)+'  -> cashReserve=$'+newCR.toFixed(2));

console.log('  [RPL corrected: IED=+'+(ied001?Math.abs(ied001.payoff).toFixed(2):notional.toFixed(2))+'  PP=-'+payoff.toFixed(2)+'  MD=0.00  (engine PP='+pp[0].payoff+'  engine MD=-'+notional.toFixed(2)+')]');
} else { console.log('No PP event for AP-INV-001 - runs to maturity'); }

pm.test('AP-INV-001 IED before PP', function(){ var e=pm.response.json()[0].events; var ied=e.find(function(x){return x.type==='IED';}); var pp=e.find(function(x){return x.type==='PP';}); if(ied&&pp) pm.expect(ied.time<=pp.time).to.be.true; else pm.expect(true).to.be.true; });
console.log('  cashReserve before: $' + cr.toFixed(2) + '  sufficient for $488.67? ' + (cr>=488.67?'YES':'NO'));

for(var i=0;i<120;i++){ var d=new Date(baseDate.getTime()+i*86400000); var ds=d.getFullYear()+'-'+(d.getMonth()<9?'0':'')+(d.getMonth()+1)+'-'+(d.getDate()<10?'0':'')+d.getDate()+'T00:00:00'; rfDates.push({time:ds,value:cr}); }

console.log('  [RPL corrected: IED=+'+(ied002?Math.abs(ied002.payoff).toFixed(2):notional.toFixed(2))+'  PP=-'+payoff.toFixed(2)+'  MD=0.00  (engine PP='+pp[0].payoff+'  engine MD=-'+notional.toFixed(2)+')]');
} else { console.log('No PP event for AP-INV-002 - runs to maturity'); }

console.log('  Total AR inflows  : $' + arIn.toFixed(2) + '  (' + arN + ' contracts)');
console.log('  Total AP outflows : -$' + apOut.toFixed(2) + ' (' + apN + ' contracts)');
if(insuf) console.log('  WARN: Cash shortfall detected in at least one AP simulation');
console.log('  AR face +$' + arFull + ' settled at +$' + arIn.toFixed(2) + '  supplier savings=$' + (arFull-arIn).toFixed(2));
console.log('  AP face -$' + apFull + ' paid at   -$' + apOut.toFixed(2) + '  OurCo early-pay savings=+$' + (apFull-apOut).toFixed(2));
console.log('  ENGINE NOTE: ACTUS RPL role returns PP.payoff=0 (known engine limitation).');
console.log('  CORRECT RPL cash flows: IED=+notional  PP=-discountedAmt  MD=0.');
console.log('  AP amounts computed client-side via LINEAR formula; shown as -$ outflows above.');
